# viettelidc_ovpc_vpc (Data Source)

Look up an existing ViettelIDC VPC by id or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "viettelidc_ovpc_vpc" "main" {
  name = "my-vpc"
}

output "vpc_cidr" {
  value = data.viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.cidr_block
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) VPC ID. Mutually optional with name.
- `name` (String) VPC name. Mutually optional with id.

### Read-Only

- `cidr_block` (String) CIDR block of the VPC.
- `description` (String) VPC description.
- `status` (String) VPC status.
